subject: Plan protein node export path
description: Use current OpenTargets target data and legacy gene/protein mappings to decide the safest path for nodes/protein.parquet and protein remapping before interaction/MoA exports.
result: Applied Jérémie's schema decision: protein primary IDs are Ensembl Protein ENSP, not UniProt. Updated manage_db/kg_schema.py NodeType.PROTEIN primary ontology/id_format/example/xrefs and CLAUDE.md node schema/protein-conflation note. Tests passed: tests/test_kg_storage.py and tests/test_credibility.py.
